import { getSheet } from './get-sheet'; /** * Extracts and wipes the cache * @returns {String} */ export let extractCss = (target) => { let sheet = getSheet(target); let out = sheet.data; sheet.data = ''; return out; }; /** * Updates the target and keeps a local cache * @param {String} css * @param {Object} sheet * @param {Boolean} append * @param {?String} cssToReplace */ export let update = (css, sheet, append, cssToReplace) => { cssToReplace ? (sheet.data = sheet.data.replace(cssToReplace, css)) : sheet.data.indexOf(css) === -1 && (sheet.data = append ? css + sheet.data : sheet.data + css); };
